title: Invoice Automation for UK Logistics Firm
description: Automated end-to-end invoicing: data extraction from orders, PDF generation, email delivery, and CRM update — all triggered automatically on new orders.

title: SharePoint Approval Workflow
description: Built multi-stage document approval workflows with automated notifications, deadline reminders, and full audit trail in SharePoint.

title: CRM & Email Marketing Integration
description: Connected HubSpot CRM with Mailchimp for automated lead nurturing sequences, and Stripe for automatic deal creation on successful payments.
results: Zero missed follow-ups, 40% faster sales cycle
